name: Extract structured data from a PPTX presentation
prompt: Read review.pptx and extract its contents into slides_data.json with: (1) title: the presentation title from slide 1, (2) subtitle: the subtitle from slide 1, (3) slide_count: total number of slides, (4) slides: array of objects each with 'title' (string) and 'bullets' (array of strings) for each slide's content. Also extract: (5) total_revenue: the total revenue number (as a number, in millions), (6) regions: array of objects with 'name' and 'revenue' (number in millions) from the revenue slide, (7) yoy_growth: the year-over-year growth percentage as a number.

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
